title: DevOps
excerpt: CI/CD, infrastructure as code, SRE, and platform engineering — ship faster and more safely, with the metrics to prove it.

seo.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering Services | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion builds CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, observability, and SRE practices that improve DORA metrics and let teams ship safely.

process.desc: Current pipeline, lead time, change-failure rate, and toil.
Robust CI/CD with testing, scanning, and progressive delivery.
Infrastructure as code with policy and GitOps.
Observability, SLOs, and on-call that doesn't burn people out.

blocks.text: DevOps is less about tools than about flow: how quickly and safely a change goes from commit to production. Baalvion builds the pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, and observability that make shipping routine rather than risky, and we measure progress with DORA metrics. It's the discipline distilled in [DevOps best practices that actually matter](/news/tech/devops-best-practices).

items: **Speed and safety:** better lead time and lower change-failure rate.
**Reproducibility:** infrastructure defined as code, not clicks.

blocks.text: We assess the current pipeline and toil, build robust CI/CD with testing and progressive delivery, codify infrastructure with policy and GitOps, and operate with observability and SLOs. The pipeline craft is detailed in [designing robust CI/CD pipelines](/news/tech/ci-cd-pipelines) and [infrastructure as code](/news/tech/infrastructure-as-code).
CI/CD systems, Terraform and other IaC, Kubernetes, observability stacks, GitOps workflows, and SLO tooling. DevOps pairs naturally with our [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions) practice.

We run our own platform with these practices, so we know what reliable delivery looks like under real load — see [observability for distributed systems](/news/tech/observability-for-distributed-systems). Combine DevOps with [enterprise software](/services/enterprise-software) and [technology consulting](/services/technology-consulting).

faqs.a: Deployment frequency, lead time for changes, change-failure rate, and time to restore — the four research-backed measures of software delivery performance we use to track progress.
Building an internal platform (pipelines, IaC, golden paths) so product teams ship safely without reinventing infrastructure each time.

faqs.q: Do you do SRE and on-call?
faqs.a: Yes — we define SLOs, build observability, and design on-call that's sustainable rather than burnout-inducing.

faqs.q: How does this relate to cloud?
faqs.a: Closely — DevOps practices run best on well-architected [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions).

internalLinks.anchor: DevOps best practices that actually matter
